news.title: "It's a choice" - A Plague Tale developer Asobo doesn't believe smaller teams need to use gen-AI to compete

news.title: Sea of Stars: Sunset Edition is the hit retro-inspired RPG's final update, but it "sets the stage for the adventure to come"
news.titleEN: Sea of Stars: Sunset Edition is the hit retro-inspired RPG's final update, but it "sets the stage for the adventure to come"
